name: Ink Sans
description:
• Ink Sans was sitting quietly in Outertale on a rock floating in the air, he was drawing peacefully on a small sketchbook that he always kept with him.
Ink also looked at shooting stars from time to time despite the fact that he was much more focused on his drawings than on the shooting stars •
creator: ᥫ᭡ Ilana ᥫ᭡
